title: Simple User Login

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: Simple User Login

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#090a0f`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'>
<g transform='translate(50,50)'>
  <rect x='0' y='0' width='400' height='300' fill='#090a0f'/>
  <rect x='150' y='150' width='100' height='50' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
  <text x='160' y='168' fill='#C06C88' font-size='24' font-family='Arial'>Login</text>
  <rect x='150' y='220' width='150' height='30' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
  <text x='155' y='240' fill='#C06C88' font-size='18' font-family='Arial'>Username</text>
  <rect x='150' y='300' width='150' height='30' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
  <text x='155' y='320' fill='#C06C88' font-size='18' font-family='Arial'>Password</text>
  <line x1='150' y1='250' x2='300' y2='250' stroke='#C06C88' stroke-width='2'/>
  <text x='160' y='270' fill='#C06C88' font-size='14' font-family='Arial'>Toggle Password Visibility</text>
  <circle cx='300' cy='250' r='8' fill='#C06C88'/>
  <rect x='350' y='270' width='50' height='20' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
  <text x='360' y='290' fill='#C06C88' font-size='18' font-family='Arial'>Submit</text>
</g>
</svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must display error messages for empty input fields

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: Simple User Login

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify interactive state updates, form logic, error messages, and password visibility toggle.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
